sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114992" key="xrusoto/kos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῡσο-τόκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n114992.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">laying golden eggs,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὄρνις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:343" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">343</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
